title: lithocardium hookerianum
intro: Lithocardium hookerianum, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the foxglove family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include the presence of cardiac glycosides that can help regulate heart rhythm and increase cardiac output. The health benefits of Lithocardium hookerianum include its ability to treat conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure, as well as its use as a diuretic to reduce fluid retention. Lithocardium hookerianum is typically prepared as a tincture or a dried leaf extract, which can be used to treat various heart-related conditions under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
